zh.lifeSummary: 當Simon von Saarbrücken II於1150年出生在德國海因里希_海普洛文次薩爾布呂肯薩爾布呂肯時，他的父親Simon I. von Saarbrücken31歲，母親Mechthild von Sponheim26歲。他和Luitgard von Leiningen至少有3個兒子和3個女兒。他去世於大約1207年在德國海藍-普法爾茲海-斯盧可-可萊斯萊寧根享年58歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Simon von Saarbrücken II于1150年出生在德国海因里希_海普洛文次薩爾布呂肯薩爾布呂肯时，他的父亲Simon I. von Saarbrücken31岁，母亲Mechthild von Sponheim26岁。他和Luitgard von Leiningen至少有3个儿子和3个女儿。他去世于大约1207年在德国海藍-普法爾茲海-斯盧可-可萊斯萊寧根享年58岁。

nameMeanings.name: von
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Cambodian: written វ៉ុន, unexplained.

variants.name: Vaughan
meanings: Welsh: from fychan, a lenited form of bychan, a diminutive of bach ‘little’. This was often used to distinguish the younger of two bearers of the same personal name, typically the son of a father with the same name.

nameMeanings.name: Simon
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Usual English form of Simeon , borne in the New Testament by various characters: two apostles, a brother of Jesus, a Pharisee, a leper, a tanner, a sorcerer (who offered money for the gifts of the Holy Ghost, giving rise to the term simony), and the man who carried Jesus's cross to the Crucifixion.

variants.name: Simen
meanings: Usual English form of Simeon , borne in the New Testament by various characters: two apostles, a brother of Jesus, a Pharisee, a leper, a tanner, a sorcerer (who offered money for the gifts of the Holy Ghost, giving rise to the term simony), and the man who carried Jesus's cross to the Crucifixion.

en.lifeSummary: When Simon von Saarbrücken II was born in 1150, in Saarbrücken, Saarbrücken, Rhineland, Prussia, Germany, his father, Simon I. von Saarbrücken, was 31 and his mother, Mechthild von Sponheim, was 26. He had at least 3 sons and 3 daughters with Luitgard von Leiningen. He died about 1207, in Leiningen, Rhein-Hunsrück-Kreis, Rhineland-Palatinate, Germany, at the age of 58.

fr.Saarbrücken, Saarbrücken, Saarland, Germ: Saarbrücken, Kreis Saarbrücken, La Sarre, Allemagne
fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Simon von Saarbrücken II est né en 1150, à Saarbrücken, Saarbrücken, Rhénanie, Prusse, Allemagne, son père, Simon I. von Saarbrücken, avait 31 ans et sa mère, Mechthild von Sponheim, avait 26 ans. Il a eu au moins 3 fils et 3 filles avec Luitgard von Leiningen. Il est décédé environ 1207, à Leiningen, Rhein-Hunsrück-Kreis, Rheinland-Pfalz, Allemagne, à l’âge de 58 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als Simon von Saarbrücken II 1150 in Saarbrücken, Saarbrücken, Rheinprovinz, Preußen, Deutschland geboren wurde, war sein Vater Simon I. von Saarbrücken 31 und seine Mutter Mechthild von Sponheim 26. Er hatte mit Luitgard von Leiningen mindestens 3 Söhne und 3 Töchter. Er starb um 1207 im Alter von 58 Jahren in Leiningen, Rhein-Hunsrück-Kreis, Rheinland-Pfalz, Deutschland.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Simon von Saarbrücken II è nato il nel 1150 nel Saarbrücken, Saarbrücken, Rheinprovinz, Preußen, Germania, il suo padre, Simon I. von Saarbrücken, aveva 31 anni e il suo madre, Mechthild von Sponheim, aveva 26 anni. Lui avuto almeno 3 figli e 3 figlie con Luitgard von Leiningen. Morì circa 1207, nel Leiningen, Rhein-Hunsrück-Kreis, Rheinland-Pfalz, Germania, all'età di 58 anni.

ja.lifeSummary: Simon von Saarbrücken IIが1150年にドイツプレウssンルヘインプロヴィンズサアルブルuクンサアルブルuクンで生まれた時，父Simon I. von Saarbrückenは31歳，母Mechthild von Sponheimは26歳であった。彼はLuitgard von Leiningenとの間に少なくとも3人の息子と3人の娘をもうけた。彼は約1207年にドイツルヘインランド-プファルズルヘイン-ハンスルuク-クレイスレイニンジェンで58歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Simon von Saarbrücken II(이)가 1150년 독일 프레우ss 리인프로빈츠 사아르브uc켄 사아르브uc켄에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Simon I. von Saarbrücken(은)는 31세였고, 그의 어머니 Mechthild von Sponheim(은)는 26세였다. 그는 Luitgard von Leiningen(와)과 적어도 세 명의 아들과 세 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 대략 1207년 독일 리인랜드-p팔즈 리이-헌스uck-크레이스 레이닝에서 58세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Simon von Saarbrücken II nasceu em 1150, em Saarbrücken, Saarbrücken, Rheinprovinz, Preußen, Alemanha, seu pai, Simon I. von Saarbrücken, tinha 31 anos e sua mãe, Mechthild von Sponheim, tinha 26 anos. Ele teve pelo menos 3 filhos e 3 filhas com Luitgard von Leiningen. Ele faleceu aproximadamente 1207, em Leiningen, Rhein-Hunsrück-Kreis, Rheinland-Pfalz, Alemanha, com 58 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Simon von Saarbrücken II родился в 1150 г. в местности саарбрuккен, саарбрuккен, раинпровинз, Пруссия, Германия, его отцу по имени Simon I. von Saarbrücken было 31 год, а матери, которую звали Mechthild von Sponheim, 26. У него было по крайней мере 3 сына и 3 дочери от Luitgard von Leiningen. Он умер около 1207 г. в местности лининген, раин-хунсрuкк-крис, раинланд-пфалз, Германия в возрасте 58 лет.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Simon von Saarbrücken II nació en 1150, en Saarbrücken, Saarbrücken, Rheinprovinz, Preußen, Alemania, su papá, Simon I. von Saarbrücken, tenía 31 años y su mamá, Mechthild von Sponheim, tenía 26 años. Tuvo por lo menos 3 hijos y 3 hijas con Luitgard von Leiningen. Murió aproximadamente 1207, en Leiningen, Rhein-Hunsrück-Kreis, Rheinland-Pfalz, Alemania, a la edad de 58 años.
